info.title: Policy RAG MCP
info.description: BlastPass Policy Knowledge — a mock policy knowledge base for BlastBox Omega. Tools: search_policy (natural-language search over membership/returns/loyalty terms, optional tier filter) and get_tier_refund_policy (structured refund rule per tier). Runs entirely inside the connector — no external MCP server needed.

post.description: MCP server for BlastBox Omega policy knowledge. Tools: search_policy, get_tier_refund_policy.
